sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. Investigated by the Portnoy Law Firm
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced an investigation into Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (NYSE: APD) for potential securities fraud. This follows a significant drop in Air Products' stock price on December 8, 2025, after the company disclosed advanced negotiations for a strategic consolidation with Yara International, raising concerns about integration risks and financial impact. The firm is encouraging investors to contact them to discuss their legal rights.

feed.title: Bernstein SocGen lowers Regeneron stock price target to $913
feed.summary: Bernstein SocGen Group has reduced its price target for Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) to $913 from $921, while maintaining an Outperform rating. The stock is currently trading at $766.02, significantly below the updated target. Despite the lowered target, analysts still suggest the stock is undervalued according to InvestingPro, though 8 analysts have revised earnings downwards for the upcoming period.

feed.title: Telomir Pharmaceuticals Completes TELI Acquisition, Expands Telomir-1 Rights
feed.summary: Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (TELO) has finalized its acquisition of TELI Pharmaceuticals, Inc. on April 22, 2026, issuing 34,389,710 restricted common shares to former TELI shareholders. This acquisition, which included a $1 million contribution from Bayshore Trust with an option for an additional $4 million, consolidates all global rights to Telomir-1 under Telomir Pharmaceuticals. This move eliminates geographic fragmentation and provides unified control over the development and potential commercialization of Telomir-1 worldwide.

feed.title: World Investment Advisors Acquires 8,130 Shares of Qualcomm Incorporated $QCOM
feed.summary: World Investment Advisors increased its stake in Qualcomm Incorporated by 14.3%, acquiring an additional 8,130 shares to hold a total of 64,911 shares valued at $11.103 million. Qualcomm's board has authorized a $20 billion share buyback and raised its quarterly dividend to $0.92 per share, reflecting confidence in the company. Despite insider selling, Qualcomm beat Q4 earnings estimates with $3.50 EPS on $12.25 billion revenue and provided strong Q2 guidance.

feed.title: Windward Capital Management Co. CA Has $19.31 Million Stock Position in Teradyne, Inc. $TER
feed.summary: Windward Capital Management Co. CA has slightly decreased its holdings in Teradyne, Inc. by 3.3%, now owning 99,757 shares valued at $19.31 million. Despite this, Teradyne has shown strong performance, beating earnings estimates with an EPS of $1.80 and revenue of $1.08 billion, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts with a target price of $314.53. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.12 per share.

feed.title: D.R. Horton, Inc. $DHI Shares Sold by Windward Capital Management Co. CA
feed.summary: Windward Capital Management Co. CA reduced its stake in D.R. Horton (NYSE:DHI) by 3.5% in the fourth quarter, selling 6,603 shares while still holding 180,547 shares valued

feed.title: Windward Capital Management Co. CA Sells 2,229 Shares of Costco Wholesale Corporation $COST
feed.summary: Windward Capital Management Co. CA reduced its stake in Costco Wholesale Corporation by 3.2% in Q4 2025, selling 2,229 shares and now holding 66,569 shares valued at $57.41 million. This reduction makes Costco its fifth-largest holding, representing 4.5% of its portfolio. The report also highlights Costco's strong quarterly earnings, increased dividend, and generally positive analyst ratings with a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Cummins Inc. $CMI Shares Sold by Windward Capital Management Co. CA
feed.summary: Windward Capital Management Co. CA reduced its stake in Cummins Inc. (NYSE:CMI) by 3.0% in the fourth quarter, selling 1,653 shares and now holding 52,628 shares valued at $26.86 million. Despite this, analysts from firms like Barclays and JPMorgan maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $600.27. Cummins also surpassed quarterly earnings expectations, reporting $5.81 EPS against an estimated $5.17, and declared a $2.00 quarterly dividend.

feed.title: U S Global Investors Inc. Sells 1,312,671 Shares of Silvercorp Metals Inc. $SVM
feed.summary: U S Global Investors Inc. significantly reduced its stake in Silvercorp Metals Inc. by selling 1,312,671 shares in Q4, leaving them with 250,000 shares valued at approximately $2.085 million. Despite this, other institutions like Tidal Investments and MIRAE ASSET GLOBAL ETFS Holdings increased their positions, and Baillie Gifford initiated a new stake, bringing total institutional ownership to 22.30%. Silvercorp Metals (NYSEAMERICAN:SVM) opened at $12.14, with analysts giving it a "Moderate Buy" rating and an average target price of $10.00.

feed.title: U S Global Investors Inc. Grows Stock Position in Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. $HLT
feed.summary: U S Global Investors Inc. significantly increased its stake in Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. ($HLT) by 70.5%, acquiring an additional 3,100 shares to hold a total of 7,500 shares valued at approximately $2.15 million. This increase comes amid generally positive Wall Street sentiment, with several analysts raising price targets for Hilton, although CEO Christopher J. Nassetta recently sold a large portion of his holdings. Hilton reported strong Q4 earnings, beating analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: APA (APA) Rallied Following the Surge in Oil Prices
feed.summary: APA Corporation (APA) saw its shares rally due to a surge in oil prices, driven by geopolitical instability and US-Israel strikes on Iran. This performance was highlighted in Hotchkis & Wiley Mid-Cap Value Fund's Q1 2026 investor letter, which noted the company's strong contributions to the fund's outperformance. Despite this, the firm emphasizes that other AI stocks might offer better short-term returns and higher upside potential.

feed.title: Expedia Group CFO Shake-Up Sends EXPE Stock Sliding Before Earnings
feed.summary: Expedia Group announced former Snap CFO Derek Andersen will take over as CFO on May 11, following Scott Schenkel's departure on May 16. This leadership change comes less than three weeks before Expedia's first-quarter earnings report, causing EXPE stock to slide 5.4%. The company stated Schenkel's exit was by mutual agreement and not related to operational or accounting disputes.

feed.title: Is Analog Devices’ (ADI) Upgraded Outlook and Fund Backing Reframing Its Earnings Power Story?
feed.summary: Analog Devices (ADI) is gaining institutional attention following an upgraded outlook and significant investment from Steven Romick's FPA Crescent Fund. The company is set to report Q2 fiscal 2026 earnings on May 20, 2026, with analysts raising earnings estimates and issuing a favorable Zacks Rank #2. While the improved outlook solidifies ADI's investment narrative, potential risks such as demand softness and inventory volatility remain.

feed.title: L3Harris Missile Unit Draws US$1b Investment And Potential IPO Rerating
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies' Missile Solutions business has secured a $1 billion investment from the Department of War. This funding is structured as a convertible preferred security, designed to convert to equity upon a future IPO of the Missile Solutions unit. The capital will be used for facility expansion, R&D, and national security production, highlighting the strategic importance of missile systems to U.S. defense priorities.

feed.title: Did Lake County’s Mobile Rollout Just Shift Tyler Technologies’ (TYL) Government Cloud Adoption Narrative?
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies announced that the Lake County Sheriff’s Office in Illinois has successfully implemented its Enterprise Public Safety suite, including mobile and cloud-based tools. This deployment reinforces the company's investment narrative focused on government modernization, cloud adoption, and recurring software revenue. While highlighting progress, the article notes that investors should be aware of risks such as the lumpy nature of large deals and potentially longer sales cycles impacting future growth and valuation.

feed.title: Telomir Pharmaceuticals completes TELI Pharmaceuticals acquisition By Investing.com
feed.summary: Telomir Pharmaceuticals announced the completion of its acquisition of TELI Pharmaceuticals, consolidating global rights to its lead drug candidate, Telomir-1. This transaction involved issuing restricted shares to former TELI shareholders and a $1 million contribution from Bayshore Trust, with a potential for an additional $4 million investment based on milestones. The acquisition aims to eliminate geographic fragmentation of the Telomir-1 platform and accelerate its development for conditions like triple-negative breast cancer.

feed.title: How Will Sun Communities Stock React To Its Upcoming Earnings?
feed.summary: Sun Communities (NYSE: SUI) is scheduled to report earnings on April 27, 2026, with a current market capitalization of $16 billion. Historical analysis shows that SUI has seen positive one-day post-earnings returns approximately 64% of the time over the last five years. The article provides detailed statistics on 1-day, 5-day, and 21-day post-earnings stock performance, correlations between these periods, and comparisons with peer stock reactions.

feed.title: Oppenheimer Adjusts Price Target on Tarsus Pharmaceuticals to $98 From $105, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Oppenheimer has adjusted its price target for Tarsus Pharmaceuticals Inc. (TARS) to $98, down from $105, while maintaining an Outperform rating on the stock. This follows a similar adjustment by Mizuho, which trimmed its price target to $100 from $101. Tarsus Pharmaceuticals is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focusing on eye care and other unmet medical needs.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank Adjusts Molina Healthcare PT to $129 From $109, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has increased its price target for Molina Healthcare (NYSE:MOH) to $129 from $109 while maintaining a Hold rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst Molina Healthcare's recent financial performance, including beating Q1 adjusted earnings and controlled medical costs. The article suggests this news is reserved for members, prompting registration to unlock the full content.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider WEC Energy Group (WEC) After Recent Utility Sector Focus?
feed.summary: WEC Energy Group (WEC) is currently trading around US$115.57 and recent analyses suggest it is fairly valued. While the Dividend Discount Model indicates a slight discount of 2.3% to its intrinsic value of US$118.29, its P/E ratio of 24.17x is slightly above the industry average, yet close to Simply Wall St's proprietary "Fair Ratio." The article concludes that the stock appears to be priced appropriately based on these valuation approaches.

feed.title: GTA 6 fans, mark your calendars: the release date may be cemented soon
feed.summary: Take-Two Interactive Software, parent company of Rockstar Games, is set to host a financial results call on May 21 for fiscal year 2026. This call is expected to provide the clearest indication yet of whether Grand Theft Auto 6's current November 19 release date will hold, with analysts suggesting a delay is unlikely if financial forecasts are stable. Despite ongoing speculation, industry insiders from the GTA 6 O'Clock podcast express high confidence in the November release and downplay the chances of a third delay.

feed.title: Assessing T. Rowe Price (TROW) Valuation After Expanded 55ip Tax Optimization Partnership
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price Group (TROW) has expanded its partnership with J.P. Morgan's 55ip to offer tax-optimized model portfolios for financial advisors. Despite recent positive share price momentum, the stock is considered slightly undervalued with a fair value of $100.58 against a current price of $99.49. However, the valuation is sensitive to potential fee pressures and fund outflows.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Digs into Spring with Demo Days and Yard & Garden Days
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company announced the return of its Demo Days event on April 25 & 26, allowing customers nationwide to test drive zero-turn and riding mowers with exclusive offers. Simultaneously, their Yard and Garden Days, running until May 10, offer special deals on various gardening supplies. These events aim to help customers prepare for spring with knowledgeable assistance and flexible financing options.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line Stock Is Down 22% in 6 Months: Can It Reach $26 by 2017?
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings (NCLH) has faced pressure due to investor concerns over high debt, fuel costs, and slower profit growth, despite improved revenue in 2025. A valuation model projects NCLH stock could reach $26 per share by December 2030, representing a 42.2% total return and 7.8% annualized return from its current price of $18, assuming stable demand, improved margins, and reduced leverage. The company is actively addressing these issues through board refreshment, capacity growth initiatives, and efforts to improve profitability while managing its capital structure.

feed.title: RBC Adjusts Price Target on DuPont de Nemours to $56 From $60, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC has adjusted its price target for DuPont de Nemours (DD) to $56, down from $60, while reiterating its Outperform rating on the stock. This update reflects a revised valuation perspective by the analyst firm. DuPont de Nemours is a specialty chemicals manufacturer specializing in products like copolymers, polyethylene, and fluorine, with significant sales across the United States, Asia/Pacific, and Europe.

feed.title: SkyWest, Inc. (NASDAQ:SKYW) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: SkyWest, Inc. reported Q1 2026 net income of $102 million, or $2.50 per diluted share, surpassing expectations. The company highlighted increased production, fleet utilization, and strategic initiatives, including the launch of the CRJ450 with United and ongoing E175 deliveries. SkyWest aims for continued profitability in 2026, driven by fleet flexibility, debt reduction, and a strong balance sheet despite anticipated elevated fuel costs.

feed.title: Sandisk upgraded at GF Securities with $1,277 price target (SNDK:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: GF Securities upgraded Sandisk (SNDK) to Buy with a $1,277 price target, leading to a 2.6% rise in shares during premarket trading. The upgrade comes ahead of Sandisk's expected FY3Q26 revenue report on April 30.

feed.title: Sunlands posts 2025 SEC filing, offers audited report on request
feed.summary: Sunlands Technology Group (NYSE: STG) has filed its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, with the U.S. SEC on April 24, 2026. The report and audited financial statements are accessible on the company's investor relations website and the SEC's website. Shareholders and ADS holders can request a free hard copy of the annual report by contacting sl-ir@sunlands.com.

feed.title: Principal Financial Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:PFG) Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.82
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group (NASDAQ:PFG) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.82 per share, representing a 2.5% increase from its previous dividend. Shareholders of record on June 1st will receive the payment on June 26th. The company maintains a conservative payout ratio, with analysts expecting future earnings to comfortably cover the increased dividend.

feed.title: Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.26
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.26 per share, payable on June 22nd to shareholders of record on May 27th. The basic materials company reported strong first-quarter earnings, beating analyst estimates with $2.90 EPS on revenues of $7.31 billion, a 45.8% increase year-over-year. Analysts have a "Moderate Buy" rating on NEM, with a consensus price target of $139.81.

feed.title: L3Harris Technologies Inc Declares Quarterly Dividend of $1.25 (NYSE:LHX)
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies Inc (NYSE:LHX) has declared a quarterly dividend of $1.25 per share, payable on June 26th to shareholders of record on June 5th. This represents an annualized dividend yield of 1.5%. The company has consistently increased its dividend for 24 consecutive years, with a payout ratio indicating strong coverage by earnings.

feed.title: Cigna says one prior authorization standard will cover 70% of volume by year-end
feed.summary: The Cigna Group announced a commitment to standardize electronic prior authorization submission requirements for commonly reviewed medical services, aiming to cover over 70% of prior authorization volume by the end of the year. This initiative is expected to reduce administrative burdens for providers and accelerate patient access to care, building on a previous 15% reduction in medical prior authorizations. Cigna's effort aligns with broader industry initiatives and partnerships with HHS and CMS to streamline the prior authorization process.

feed.title: How Will Brown & Brown Stock React To Its Upcoming Earnings?
feed.summary: Brown & Brown (NYSE: BRO) is scheduled to report its earnings on April 27, 2026. The article analyzes historical post-earnings stock reactions for BRO over the past five years, noting that positive one-day returns occurred in approximately 39% of cases. It also provides statistics for 5-day and 21-day returns and examines the correlation between short-term and medium-term returns to help event-driven traders.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: The Bancorp beats EPS but misses revenue in Q1 2026
feed.summary: The Bancorp (TBBK) reported mixed financial results for Q1 2026, beating EPS expectations with $1.41 against a forecast of $1.33, but missing revenue targets by 27.75% at $132.5 million. Despite the revenue shortfall, the company's stock saw a slight increase, and it reported strong loan portfolio growth, particularly in credit sponsorship loans. The Bancorp maintained its optimistic EPS guidance for 2026 ($5.90) and 2027 ($8.10-$8.30), driven by fintech and credit sponsorship initiatives.

feed.title: Turtle Beach Corporation to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Thursday, May 7, 2026
feed.summary: Turtle Beach Corporation (Nasdaq: TBCH) announced its plan to report first-quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, May 7, 2026, after the Nasdaq market closes. The company will also host a conference call and audio webcast on the same day at 4:30 p.m. ET/1:30 p.m. PT to discuss the results with CEO Cris Keirn and CFO Mark Weinswig. Interested individuals can access the live webcast or join the conference call by phone.

feed.title: Cleveland Cavaliers Unveil Cavs Rebound Lab in Association with Sherwin-Williams at Friendly Inn Settlement
feed.summary: The Cleveland Cavaliers have partnered with Sherwin-Williams to launch the Cavs Rebound Lab at the Friendly Inn Settlement. This initiative aims to provide community support and resources, aligning with both organizations' commitment to local engagement in Cleveland.

feed.title: Domino's Pizza Stock Could Be Cheap Ahead of Earnings Next Week
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza (DPZ) stock appears undervalued ahead of its Q1 earnings release on April 27th, driven by its strong free cash flow. The company's free cash flow margin in 2025 was 13.6%, and if Q1's margin remains robust, analysts may increase their price targets, potentially valuing the stock at $434.84. Investors can also consider selling out-of-the-money put options as a strategy to capitalize on this potential undervaluation.

feed.title: The Gross Law Firm Reminds Shareholders of a Lead Plaintiff
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm is reminding shareholders of Stellantis N.V. (STLA) about a lead plaintiff deadline of June 8, 2026, for a class-action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Stellantis made misleading statements regarding its earnings growth potential and its position in the electric vehicle market, leading to a significant stock price decline on February 6, 2026. Shareholders who purchased STLA shares between February 26, 2025, and February 5, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm.

feed.title: Turtle Beach schedules May 7 earnings call after market close
feed.summary: Turtle Beach Corporation (Nasdaq: TBCH) announced it will report its first quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, May 7, 2026, after market close. The company will also host a conference call and audio webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET/1:30 p.m. PT to discuss the results, led by CEO Cris Keirn and CFO Mark Weinswig. Details for live webcast and telephone dial-in, along with replay information, are available on the company’s investor relations site.

feed.title: Telomir (NASDAQ: TELO) closes TELI acquisition, issues 34,389,710 shares and adds funding
feed.summary: Telomir Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: TELO) has finalized its acquisition of TELI Pharmaceuticals, issuing 34,389,710 restricted shares to TELI's former shareholders based on independent company valuations. Concurrently, Bayshore Trust contributed $1 million to Telomir and holds an option for an additional $4 million investment tied to Telomir-1 milestones, including FDA IND acceptance and initiation of a Phase 1/2 clinical study. This transaction consolidates all global rights to Telomir-1 under Telomir, streamlining its development and commercialization across international markets.

feed.title: Telomir locks up worldwide rights to its lead drug, with $1M now and $4M tied to milestones
feed.summary: Telomir Pharmaceuticals has completed its acquisition of TELI Pharmaceuticals, securing global rights to its lead drug candidate, Telomir-1 (Telomir-Zn). The deal involved $1 million at closing and up to an additional $4 million tied to milestone achievements like IND acceptance and Phase 1/2 trial initiation. Telomir has already submitted an IND for Telomir-Zn for advanced/metastatic triple-negative breast cancer and plans a Phase 1/2 trial if cleared.

feed.title: IT Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Gartner, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm is reminding investors of a class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. for alleged securities fraud, claiming the company made false and misleading statements regarding seasonality risks and contract value growth. The lawsuit covers investors who purchased shares between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, and encourages them to contact the firm before May 18, 2026, to participate.

feed.title: IT DEADLINE: The Gross Law Firm Reminds Gartner, Inc. Investors of Upcoming Securities Class Action Deadline
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a notice to shareholders of Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) regarding an upcoming securities class action deadline of May 18, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made misleading statements about its growth rates and ability to meet consulting revenue targets and contract value growth. These alleged misrepresentations led to significant stock price declines on August 5, 2025, and February 3, 2026, causing substantial losses for investors.

feed.title: Seasonal Improvements Lowered Mortgage Delinquencies in March While Prepayment Activity Reached Nearly Four-Year High
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE: ICE) reported that mortgage delinquencies saw seasonal improvements in March 2026, with the national delinquency rate falling and prepayment activity reaching a nearly four-year high. Despite these positive trends, serious delinquencies and foreclosure inventories continued to rise, with 154,000 more borrowers 90-plus days past due or in active foreclosure compared to the previous year, and foreclosure inventory hitting a six-year high. Andy Walden, head of mortgage and housing market research at ICE, noted that while overall performance remains healthy for most, the increasing late-stage delinquencies and foreclosure pipelines warrant continued monitoring.

feed.title: Wealth Science Advisors LLC Makes New $3.56 Million Investment in Equifax, Inc. $EFX
feed.summary: Wealth Science Advisors LLC has initiated a new position in Equifax, acquiring 16,400 shares valued at approximately $3.56 million, making it their 10th-largest holding. This investment comes despite recent insider selling by Equifax's CEO and EVP, totaling around $9.96 million in the last 90 days. Equifax recently reported strong Q1 results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and has a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with a price target of $231.

feed.title: Big Food Companies Revamp to Keep Up With Newcomers
feed.summary: Big food companies like PepsiCo and Kraft Heinz are undergoing significant changes to adapt to evolving consumer tastes and compete with newer market entrants. The food industry is described as chaotic for companies but offers a wide variety for consumers. This article, part of Bloomberg's Retail Monitor, provides insights into these industry trends.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) Announces Quarterly Dividend of $2.00
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) has declared a quarterly dividend of $2.00 per share, an 11.1% increase from its previous dividend. The industrial products company, which has raised its dividend for 70 consecutive years, will distribute the dividend on June 5th to shareholders of record by May 8th. Analysts expect the company to continue covering its dividend with a future payout ratio of 21.1%.

feed.title: Standex International Corporation (NYSE:SXI) Plans $0.34 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Standex International (NYSE:SXI) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.34 per share, marking its 14th consecutive year of dividend increases. The industrial products company boasts a low payout ratio of 15.7% and has recently exceeded its quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. Investors of record on May 8th will receive the dividend on May 22nd.

feed.title: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (NASDAQ:JBHT) Announces $0.45 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (NASDAQ:JBHT) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share, payable on May 22nd to shareholders of record on May 8th. The company has a history of raising its dividend annually for the past 22 years and analysts expect earnings to sufficiently cover future dividend payments. Institutional investors have recently adjusted their holdings in the transportation company.

feed.title: XY Planning Network Inc. Increases Stake in Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: XY Planning Network Inc. significantly increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) by 169.9% during the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 5,844 shares valued at $1.834 million. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Alphabet, with notable increases from Tradewinds LLC and Atlantic Union Bankshares Corp. The article also details recent insider selling, key news impacting Alphabet, and its stock performance and dividend announcements.
